x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR Centers of Excellence (COEs) define the organizational routing structure Now Assist uses for intelligent HR case assignment. Without COEs, Now Assist cannot provide department-aware AI routing.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){try{var testGr=new GlideRecord("sn_hr_core_coe");testGr.setLimit(1);testGr.query();if(!testGr.isValid()){return{status:"not_applicable",actualValue:"HR COE table not found",finding:"HR Centers of Excellence table does not exist on this instance."};} var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_hr_core_coe");ga.addQuery("active",true);ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();var count=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;var actualValue=count+" active HR Centers of Excellence";if(count>=3){return{status:"ready",actualValue:actualValue,finding:count+" active HR COEs. Now Assist HRSD can provide department-aware AI case routing based on COE structure."};}else if(count>=1){return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:actualValue,finding:"Only "+count+" active HR COE(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist HRSD routing will have limited organizational differentiation."};}else{return{status:"not_ready",actualValue:actualValue,finding:"No active HR COEs configured. COEs define the routing structure Now Assist uses for intelligent HR case assignment."};}}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed — manual verification required",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};}})();
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure HR COEs aligned to your HR organizational structure via sn_hr_core_coe_list.do. Assign HR services to appropriate COEs. Target: 3+ active COEs. Now Assist HRSD uses COE structure for AI-driven case routing recommendations.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c5a
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[HR Centers of Excellence (COEs) define the organizational routing structure Now Assist uses for intelligent HR case assignment. Without COEs, Now Assist cannot provide department-aware AI routing.]]></ai_justification><check_name>HR COE Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){try{var testGr=new GlideRecord("sn_hr_core_coe");testGr.setLimit(1);testGr.query();if(!testGr.isValid()){return{status:"not_applicable",actualValue:"HR COE table not found",finding:"HR Centers of Excellence table does not exist on this instance."};} var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_hr_core_coe");ga.addQuery("active",true);ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();var count=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;var actualValue=count+" active HR Centers of Excellence";if(count>=3){return{status:"ready",actualValue:actualValue,finding:count+" active HR COEs. Now Assist HRSD can provide department-aware AI case routing based on COE structure."};}else if(count>=1){return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:actualValue,finding:"Only "+count+" active HR COE(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist HRSD routing will have limited organizational differentiation."};}else{return{status:"not_ready",actualValue:actualValue,finding:"No active HR COEs configured. COEs define the routing structure Now Assist uses for intelligent HR case assignment."};}}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed — manual verification required",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};}})();]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>HRSD</module><number>CHK0000404</number><order>120</order><remediation_guidance>Configure HR COEs aligned to your HR organizational structure via sn_hr_core_coe_list.do. Assign HR services to appropriate COEs. Target: 3+ active COEs. Now Assist HRSD uses COE structure for AI-driven case routing recommendations.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>0bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c5a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>HR COE Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_0bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c5a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
